name: Discovery via PowerSploit Recon Module Detected
description: Detects the execution of specific PowerSploit Reconnaissance module scripts. Adversaries may abuse these modules to perform discovery and gather information about the target environment. You **must** update the `powersploit_recon_modules` list with the relevant module names or patterns used in your environment.

prompts.prompt: Execution of a PowerSploit Reconnaissance module script detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Script Block** {script_block}. Investigate this activity to determine if it is a legitimate administrative action or an adversary performing discovery in your environment.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: PowerShell Script Block Logging Event ID (e.g., 4104).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the PowerShell script was executed.

parameters.name: script_block
parameters.description: The content of the PowerShell script block.
